source_command: manual: isolate the Paneflow debug cache; PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD=shadow PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD_RETENTION=raw_local PANEFLOW_IPC_SCRIPTING=1 PANEFLOW_SOCKET_PATH=<isolated-pipe> target/debug/paneflow.exe; workspace.up two scripted panes for 2700 seconds; verify zero *-report.json
notes: Targeted pass: the isolated live GPUI shadow run completed the full 45-minute target with two scripted panes and zero mismatch report files.
The run started from an empty debug cache with one default workspace; the prior user cache was restored after the run.
Raw local recordings and runtime state remain outside Hera; this file and the linked live summary contain only scrubbed aggregate evidence.
US-010 dogfood is complete, while host replacement remains blocked by separate platform, package, API and security evidence gaps.
